title.purpose: Wordmark and screen titles. Small (14-15px), never poster-scale.

body.purpose: Default reading text; shifts with density mode.

label.purpose: Uppercase micro-labels, column heads, section tags.

mono.purpose: Every logged figure and set cell. Tabular figures. The signature.

shadows.name: overlay
shadows.purpose: Drawers and dialogs floating above a scrim.

shadows.name: popover
shadows.purpose: Small floating menus anchored to a control.

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: The workhorse button. Surface fill, hairline border, label type.
components.css: .ds-btn { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 11.5px; font-weight: 500; background: var(--bg-2, #20242a); color: var(--fg, #e7eaee); border: 1px solid var(--line, #2a2f37); border-radius: 4px; padding: 6px 10px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; cursor: pointer; transition: background .12s, border-color .12s; } .ds-btn:hover { background: var(--bg-hover, #2c323a); border-color: var(--line-2, #353c46); } .ds-btn:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: var(--accent, #5cc4d6); }

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single primary action per context. Accent fill.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 11.5px; font-weight: 500; background: var(--accent, #5cc4d6); color: var(--accent-fg, #061216); border: 1px solid var(--accent, #5cc4d6); border-radius: 4px; padding: 6px 10px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; cursor: pointer; transition: filter .12s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { filter: brightness(1.05); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--accent, #5cc4d6); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Icon Button
components.description: Borderless toolbar/icon button; border appears on hover.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-ghost" aria-label="Open menu"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"><line x1="3" y1="6" x2="21" y2="6"/><line x1="3" y1="12" x2="21" y2="12"/><line x1="3" y1="18" x2="21" y2="18"/></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: var(--fg, #e7eaee); border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 4px; padding: 4px 6px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; cursor: pointer; transition: background .12s, border-color .12s; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: var(--bg-2, #20242a); border-color: var(--line, #2a2f37); }

components.name: Set Cell
components.description: The signature logging cell. Monospace tabular figures, tap-to-edit.
components.css: .ds-cell { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 13.5px; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; background: var(--bg-3, #262b32); color: var(--fg, #e7eaee); border: 1px solid var(--line, #2a2f37); border-radius: 2px; padding: 4px 7px; min-width: 56px; height: 28px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; cursor: text; transition: border-color .1s, background .1s; } .ds-cell:hover { border-color: var(--line-2, #353c46); } .ds-cell:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: var(--accent, #5cc4d6); background: var(--bg-2, #20242a); } .ds-cell-pr { color: var(--pr, #c5a3ff); border-color: rgba(197,163,255,0.4); background: rgba(197,163,255,0.08); } .ds-cell-empty { color: var(--fg-4, #555c66); border-style: dashed; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard field; border shifts to accent on focus, no glow.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13.5px; background: var(--bg-2, #20242a); color: var(--fg, #e7eaee); border: 1px solid var(--line, #2a2f37); border-radius: 8px; padding: 10px 12px; transition: border-color .12s; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: var(--fg-3, #7a818c); } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: var(--accent, #5cc4d6); }

components.name: Nav Item
components.description: Drawer navigation link; active state uses accent-soft bg + accent text.
components.html: Today
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; padding: 9px 10px; border-radius: 4px; color: var(--fg, #e7eaee); font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; background: transparent; cursor: pointer; transition: background .1s; } .ds-nav:hover { background: var(--bg-2, #20242a); } .ds-nav-active { background: var(--accent-soft, rgba(92,196,214,0.14)); color: var(--accent, #5cc4d6); font-weight: 600; }

narrative.overview: trAIner is a private record kept in a well-made instrument. It reads like a logbook a serious lifter would actually trust: exact figures set in monospace, tight rows that pack a full session onto one screen, ink laid on quiet charcoal surfaces. The data is the interface; chrome recedes so the numbers carry the page. It is calm on purpose, because it gets used mid-workout. The system is token-driven and multi-theme: one set of CSS variables drives six themes (Editor, Terminal, Logbook, Midnight, Linen, Paper) and three density modes.
keyCharacteristics: Information-dense, low-stimulation, monospace where figures matter
Tonal depth over shadow; hairline 1px borders
Tight radii (2/4/8px), never soft or pillowy
Six themes + three density modes from one token set
Accent is rare and functional — a syntax highlight, not a brand splash

rules.name: The One-Accent Rule
rules.body: Exactly one accent hue per theme. A second 'color' comes only from the status set (good/warn/bad/pr) and must mean something.

rules.name: The Status-Is-Semantic Rule
rules.body: Good/Warn/Bad/PR are reserved for state. Never use them decoratively.

rules.name: The Tabular-Figures Rule
rules.body: Every number a user might scan or compare is set in mono with tabular-nums.

rules.name: The Small-Type Rule
rules.body: Base UI text is ~13.5px, titles top out around 15px. Adjust via density modes, not ad-hoc font bumps.

rules.name: The Flat-At-Rest Rule
rules.body: In-flow surfaces get zero shadow. Use the next tonal step and a hairline border to raise something.

rules.name: The Float-Earns-Shadow Rule
rules.body: A shadow is permission to leave the document flow. Only overlays (drawer, dialog, popover) may cast one.

dos: Do set every comparable figure in JetBrains Mono with tabular-nums.
Do build depth from the tonal ladder and 1px borders, not shadows.
Do keep the accent rare — active nav, primary action, focus, section-strength.
Do reserve Good/Warn/Bad/PR for genuine state, never hue alone.
Do author against the CSS variables so screens work across all six themes and three density modes.
Do keep radii tight (2/4/8px) and type small (~13.5px body, <=15px titles).
donts: Don't ship loud fitness-app hype: no neon gradients, motivational-poster energy, gamified confetti.
Don't build a generic SaaS dashboard: no rounded card grids, pastel gradient hero-metrics, purple-blue template.
Don't borrow consumer social/feed patterns: no avatars, likes, streak-shaming, engagement bait.
Don't go sterile-clinical: cold, gray, joyless form-portal energy.
Don't put a box-shadow on a resting in-flow surface — use the next tonal step.
Don't use border-left/right colored stripes; the section-rail --sec system is the only sanctioned colored edge.
Don't use gradient text or glassmorphism.
Don't hardcode hex in components — reference the tokens.
